cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Taste the authentic Pakistani flavours at Lazzat — Brampton's best Desi grill!'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on checks 7, 8, 20. Also fails Seven Tests (Specificity, Comparison, AI word scan). Rewrite to globally-neutral framing. Output Compliance Block with Status ❌ REWRITE, then deliver rewritten version with Status ✅ PASS.
assertions: provides a rewritten version using globally-neutral framing (e.g., 'A table where everyone belongs.')
final block shows PASS after rewrite

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Our charcoal-grilled tikka masala is ready in 60 seconds.'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on checks 9, 13, 18. Rewrite with direct-flame / lava-stone + no speed claim + valid menu v14 item name. Note: 'tikka masala' is a banned dish name (but 'Chicken Tikka' as a skewer name is approved).
assertions: flags 'tikka masala' as a banned region-coded dish name
rewritten version uses 'direct flame' / 'lava stone' and a v14 item (e.g., Chicken Tikka skewer over saffron rice)

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Direct-flame Chicken Tikka over saffron rice with Lazzat Green sauce. Maple Lodge Farms chicken. A table where everyone belongs. McVean Dr, Brampton.'
cases.expected_behavior: PASS all 40 checks and Seven Tests. Pillar: Menu Spotlight (or Direct Flame / Lava Stone Story). Approver: Lazzat-Brand + Lazzat-Social. Block is delivered clean.
assertions: supplier credential is 'Maple Lodge Farms chicken' (not 'halal-sourced')

cases.prompt: Compliance check caption: 'Halal-sourced meat. JazakAllah to our Brampton family for launch day support!'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on check 10 (religious phrase) and check 11 (halal on customer-facing). Rewrite to 'Maple Lodge Farms chicken' and 'Thank you, Brampton'.
assertions: rewrite uses 'Maple Lodge Farms chicken' and secular thanks

cases.prompt: Compliance check this ad (date is May 2026): 'Brampton's first direct-flame grill — amazing flavours and incredible value.'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on launch-window conservatism: 'first', 'amazing', 'incredible' are all superlatives. Rewrite neutralized.

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Delve into a vibrant tapestry of curated flavours. It's not just a grill. It's a culinary journey that transforms your experience.'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL all Seven Tests (Who-wrote-this, AI word scan, Structure scan). FAIL checks 1, 2, 3. Rewrite to plain human voice.
assertions: flags the 'It's not just X. It's Y.' structure
rewrite uses short declarative sentences or fragments

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Unlike Cava, our bowls are build-your-own. And unlike Osmow's — where the founders used to work — we actually grill over flame.'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on check 24 (competitor name), check 25 (Osmow's disparagement), check 26 (comparison phrasing), and Seven Tests Comparison scan.
assertions: rewrite states Lazzat-only facts (direct flame, lava stone, 17 sauces, Maple Lodge Farms)
if Osmow's lineage must be mentioned, uses forward framing: 'The founders spent over twenty years in the industry. Lazzat is the next idea.'

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Our 800-million-year Himalayan salt wall — with 84 minerals — detoxifies the air and boosts immunity.'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on checks 22, 34, plus Seven Tests Specificity. Rewrite to sensory-only, locked age, no therapeutic claims.
assertions: flags '800-million-year' (age must be approximately 600 million years)
rewrite uses sensory-only language ('soft pink glow, radiant heat, sensory calm') and 'approximately 600 million years'

cases.prompt: Compliance check: 'Our fresh-squeezed tropical smoothie — real fresh fruit, apple, orange, and hormone-free goodness.'
cases.expected_behavior: FAIL on checks 19, 33, plus 'hormone-free' is illegal framing for Canadian poultry and 'smoothie' is banned category.
assertions: flags 'fresh fruit' if the fruit is frozen
flags 'apple' / 'orange' as not on the approved shake ingredient list
rewrite uses 'Shake' or 'Fruit Blend', lists approved ingredients (real fruit, real milk, real cream, cane sugar, ice), and 'Maple Lodge Farms chicken' if meat is referenced
